name: Compose — Promotion CTA Coachmark
description: Korean-locale expanded compose surface that introduces the promotion-link affordance. Same modal frame as [[compose]] / [[compose-offereval]] but with a fourth megaphone icon added to the insert toolbar, a teaching coachmark tooltip pointing at it, and a right-aligned 'attempts remaining' quota indicator. Tapping the megaphone opens [[compose-kr-promotion]] as a bottom sheet (purchase / activation flow). Demo strings render English per AGENTS.md rule 7; the canonical Korean source lives in [[patterns/compose_kr]].
useCases: introduce the promotion-link feature in compose

actionBar.note: Top action bar (modal, NOT navigation-bar/*). Leading 'Cancel' + trailing 'Post' `button/text`; Post is muted while invalid. Same shape as [[compose]] and [[compose-offereval]].

channelPicker.note: Channel picker row in empty state — no channel selected yet, label is the call to action. Tap opens [[compose-channel]] as a bottom sheet.

identity.note: Identity row (read-only, no chevron). Format is 'company · alias'.

title.note: Title input row — `sys.typo.heading.md` bold, no chrome. First member of the form stack.

props.placeholder: Posts judged off-topic by other users and reported may be auto-hidden. Posts containing illegal uploads or distribution may be permanently restricted.

body.note: Body input row in the form stack — placeholder doubles as policy guidance.

items.label: Tap to mention a company, industry, or role

options.note: Option-toggle row on the sunken surface band. Uses `button/check` at the medium rung (40px min-height, 12-rank label, 24px leading checkbox).

toolbar.note: Insert toolbar — FOUR leading `button/icon` triggers (image attach, `@` mention, `#` hashtag, megaphone) plus a right-aligned cluster: brand-colored '3 attempts remaining' quota text and a 'Hide company name' `button/check` medium (see `hideCompanyName` region). The megaphone icon is the paired trigger for [[compose-kr-promotion]] — tapping it opens that bottom sheet.

hideCompanyName.note: Right-aligned `button/check` medium in the insert toolbar row. Same component as the `options` region — only the host row and alignment differ.

coachmark.note: Teaching coachmark anchored to the megaphone icon in the toolbar — transient overlay with a directional arrow pointing down at the trigger. Out-of-system overlay (not a `banner` strictly — a coachmark with a target arrow); modeled here as `banner` with a `primary` tone for the bubble surface, but the directional arrow + anchor behavior is not in-system. Document as motivation for a future `coachmark` family if/when it becomes load-bearing.

rules: Top action bar is NOT a `navigation-bar` sub — same as [[compose]].
The megaphone `button/icon` in the toolbar is the paired trigger for [[compose-kr-promotion]] — that bottom sheet must not appear without this trigger somewhere on screen.

The coachmark is a teaching overlay, NOT a `banner` in the strict in-system sense — it has a directional arrow anchored at a target. Modeled as `banner` here as the closest in-system fit, with a note flagging the gap.
Demo strings render English per AGENTS.md rule 7. The canonical Korean source is documented in [[patterns/compose_kr]].
